# fly_redis_instances (Data Source)

Lists Fly.io Redis instances.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_redis_instances" "all" {}

output "redis_names" {
  value = [for i in data.fly_redis_instances.all.instances : i.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `instances` (Attributes List) The list of Redis instances. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--instances))

<a id="nestedatt--instances"></a>
### Nested Schema for `instances`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Instance ID.
- `name` (String) Instance name.
- `plan` (String) Instance plan.
- `region` (String) Instance region.
- `status` (String) Instance status.
